//: MCP servers for the grounded build + handoff stages. Both are moving targets — verify the package names, commands, and tool signatures against current docs before wiring builder/qa/handoff to them (ARCHITECTURE.md §2).

salesforce-dx.//: Salesforce DX MCP Server (Beta). Used by designer (read-only: metadata + SOQL), builder (scratch org / deploy / run tests), and qa (run tests + SOQL). NEVER point this at a production org — see BuildResult.isProduction in driver/contracts.ts.

jira.//: Jira MCP. Used by the handoff agent to export the contracted story documentation. Replace with your team's Jira MCP server + credentials.
